title: User Signup Success
description: Verify that a new user can successfully sign up with valid email and password, and is assigned the default user role.

steps.description: Navigate to signup page
Enter a valid email address and a strong password
Submit the signup form
Verify the account is created, user is logged in, and assigned the 'user' role

title: User Login Success
description: Check that existing users can log in with valid credentials and access the user dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter valid email and password
Click login button
Verify user is authenticated and redirected to dashboard

title: User Login Failure with Invalid Credentials
description: Verify that login fails using incorrect email or password, and appropriate error message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter incorrect email or password
Click login button
Verify login is rejected and error message displayed

title: Password Reset Flow
description: Validate the password reset process requests password reset email and allows user to update password.

steps.description: Navigate to password reset page
Enter registered email address
Submit password reset request
Verify password reset email is sent
Follow password reset link received via email
Enter a new valid password and confirm
Submit new password
Verify password is updated and user can login with new password

title: Role-Based Access Control for User and Admin
description: Verify that users with 'admin' role have access to admin dashboard and management features, while regular users do not.

steps.description: Login as an admin user
Navigate to admin dashboard
Confirm admin dashboard and management features are accessible
Logout and login as regular user
Attempt to access admin dashboard
Verify access is denied for regular user

title: Product Search by EAN with Exact Match
description: Verify that searching with a valid EAN barcode returns the correct product details within 2 seconds.

steps.description: Login to user dashboard
Enter a valid EAN code into product search
Submit search
Verify correct product is returned within 2 seconds

title: Product Search by Product Name with Fuzzy Search
description: Confirm the search supports fuzzy matching of product names and returns relevant products.

steps.description: Login to user dashboard
Enter a partially correct or misspelled product name
Submit search
Verify list of relevant products including close matches is returned

title: Product Search by NCM Code with Validation
description: Ensure searching by NCM returns valid products and invalid NCM codes show appropriate error messages.

steps.description: Login to user dashboard
Enter a valid NCM code
Submit search
Verify valid products matching the NCM are returned
Enter an invalid or malformed NCM code
Submit search
Verify proper validation error is shown to user

title: Tax Calculation Accuracy for IBS and CBS
description: Validate that the tax engine calculates IBS and CBS correctly according to current legislation, including reductions and split payments.

steps.description: Search for a product with known tax parameters
Trigger tax calculation for IBS and CBS
Verify IBS and CBS amounts are calculated accurately, including any applicable reductions and split payments

title: Financial Impact Simulation Comparing Old vs New Tax System
description: Verify that the system simulates and presents a comparative financial impact between current tax burden and new IBS/CBS system.

steps.description: Select a product and retrieve tax data
Run the tax impact simulation
Verify simulation output displays side-by-side comparison of old vs new tax burdens clearly

title: AI Insights Generation for Tax Explanation
description: Ensure AI assistant generates accurate and relevant simplified tax explanations related to product queries within 5 seconds.

steps.description: Perform a product search to trigger AI insight generation
Verify AI generates tax insight that is relevant, contextually accurate, and delivered within 3-5 seconds

title: Subscription Plan Selection and Stripe Checkout Success
description: Validate that users can select subscription tiers, complete payment via Stripe checkout, and activate features post-purchase.

steps.description: Login and navigate to pricing page
Select a subscription plan
Complete payment using Stripe checkout with valid payment details
Verify subscription status updates, features are activated, and user dashboard reflects new plan

title: Subscription Upgrade and Downgrade Flow
description: Check that users can upgrade and downgrade their subscription plans and the changes reflect correctly with billing adjustments.

steps.description: Login and navigate to subscription management
Initiate plan upgrade
Complete payment for upgrade if required
Verify subscription changes and billing updates for upgrade
Initiate plan downgrade
Confirm downgrade action
Verify subscription and billing updates for downgrade

title: Subscription Cancellation and Feature Revocation
description: Ensure that users can cancel subscriptions, payment status updates accordingly, and feature access is revoked as per plan.

steps.description: Login and navigate to subscription settings
Cancel active subscription
Verify subscription status changes to cancelled and features are revoked post cancellation

title: User Dashboard Displays Recent Search History and Subscription Status
description: Validate that the user dashboard correctly shows recent product searches and reflects current subscription details accurately.

steps.description: Login and perform several product searches
Navigate to user dashboard
Verify recent search history includes latest queries and subscription summary matches active plan

title: Admin Dashboard User and Organization Management
description: Confirm that admin users can add, edit, disable, and delete users and organizations via the admin dashboard with real-time updates.

steps.description: Login as admin user
Access admin dashboard user management section
Add a new user with specific roles
Verify new user appears in user list with correct roles
Edit an existing user to change roles
Verify user roles update in real-time
Disable and then delete a user
Verify user is disabled and removed from active list
Manage organizations similarly by adding, editing, and deleting
Verify organization management actions reflect immediately

title: Admin Dashboard Product Database Management
description: Verify admin can add, update, and delete product entries in the database and see immediate effect in user product searches.

steps.description: Login as admin
Access product database management in the admin dashboard
Add a new test product with specific EAN, NCM, and name
Verify new product is accessible via product search
Update an existing product's tax data and name
Verify updates reflect in subsequent product searches and tax calculations
Delete a product
Verify product no longer appears in search results

title: Search Performance Within 2 Seconds
description: Measure product search response times to ensure results are returned within 2 seconds for all search types (EAN, NCM, name).

steps.description: Perform product search using valid EAN
Confirm response time is less than or equal to 2 seconds
Perform product search using valid product name
Confirm response time is less than or equal to 2 seconds
Perform product search using valid NCM code
Confirm response time is less than or equal to 2 seconds

title: System UI Responsiveness on Mobile Devices
description: Verify that all user interfaces (login, dashboard, admin dashboard, pricing) are fully responsive and usable on common mobile device screen sizes.

steps.description: Access UI pages on mobile emulator or real devices with different screen sizes
Verify layout is readable, controls are easily accessible, and no UI elements overlap or disappear

title: Subscription Status Updates Reflected in User Dashboard
description: Ensure that any changes in subscription status (active, expired, cancelled) are accurately reflected in the user dashboard in real time.

steps.description: Change subscription status via backend or Stripe webhook (activate, expire, cancel)
Login to user dashboard
Verify subscription status shown matches current subscription state

title: Handling of Invalid Product Search Inputs
description: Verify system handles invalid, empty, or malformed inputs in the product search gracefully with user-friendly error messages.

steps.description: Enter empty search query
Submit search
Verify prompt appears to enter a valid search term
Enter invalid characters or very long strings
Submit search
Verify search fails gracefully with an error or no results message
